title: Hackmind 01
overview: This is the story of a passionate man connected with the electronic life and whose language was misunderstood into the real world. Upon the game with the remote control of the TV, a screen travel emerges into his mind. He visualizes the transformation of his body into light and energy and his own mind out of him... Inside a world unknown to him, our protagonist immerses into a magnified space of visual sensations, colors and forms. A rhythmic and temporal cadence transport him elsewhere amplifying his own conscience and tearing down prejudices. A widespread field of sounds shows his own memories in the form of sounds and confronts him with an imaginary territory that constructs and deconstructs part of the notion of the world. showing stimuli (even closing his eyes) that increases your organic palpitations, making your adrenaline flowing and accelerated with greater intensity.
